test_command: N/A - verify file exists and is valid HTML
verification_instructions: 1. Confirm apostila.html exists at /projects/sandbox/apostilacocenf/apostila.html. 2. Verify HTML is well-formed. 3. Confirm it contains 15 distinct page sections. 4. Confirm inline SVG illustrations exist. 5. Confirm responsive CSS is embedded.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a single file creation task
environment_constraints: All assets must be self-contained in the HTML file (inline SVGs, embedded CSS, no external image dependencies). Google Fonts CDN is acceptable for typography.
contribution_requirements: Output file must be saved to /projects/sandbox/apostilacocenf/apostila.html
key_patterns: Single HTML file with embedded CSS and inline SVG illustrations. 15 page sections with unique designs. Professional color palette: dark blue, white, health green, gold accents.
directory_structure: Simple repository with MODELO.docx (original template), MODELO.pdf (PDF version), conteudo.txt (extracted text content). Output goes to apostila.html in same directory.
